title: Sweet Tofu Curry Middle Eastern Chickpeas Stir-fry
description: A post-workout middle-eastern dish featuring sweet and tender tofu mixed with chickpeas, seasoned with a blend of aromatic spices for a healthy and flavorful meal.
instructions: Heat a tablespoon of oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add the onions, garlic, and red bell pepper. Stir for about 2-3 minutes until softened.
Stir in the grated carrot and sauté for another minute.
Add chickpeas to the skillet. Stir well to combine with vegetables.
Fold in the ground spices: cumin, coriander, cinnamon, and turmeric. Mix thoroughly.
Drizzle tahini sauce over the mixture along with lemon juice. Stir again until everything is evenly coated.
Gently place the grilled tofu pieces on top of the chickpea vegetable mixture. Ensure they are evenly distributed across the pan.
Cover and cook for 5-7 minutes, stirring occasionally to prevent burning. The vegetables should be tender but still have a slight crunchiness.
Serve hot with steamed naan bread.
